creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 231328
v1

Moin moin 

The attached patch switches multimedia/emby-server to use the ImageMagick version the user set in bsd.default-version.mk -- which is 7  by default at the moment.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-multimedia-emby-server-switch-to-using-default-Image.patch

(I'm not using emby-server myself, so I would be glad if someone could test it).


mfg Tobias
